a.xlink:title: Type-safely extracts and returns the stored data value.
Constructs an AnyData storage shell with an optional initial type-safe payload.
Low-level native operating system read operation proxying requests directly down to the fd handle.
Low-level decryption routing path proxying requests down to SSL_read().
Overwrites or assigns a new type-safe payload inside the storage box.
Writes raw binary bytes out to the network socket layer.
Low-level native operating system write operation proxying requests directly up to the fd handle.
Low-level encryption routing path proxying outgoing payload directly up to SSL_write().
Core internal event handler reacting to raw descriptor readiness signals.
Non-destructively inspects the internal unread data buffer without consuming it.
Reads incoming data into a raw byte buffer up to a specified maximum size.
Core internal event handler reacting to raw descriptor readiness signals.
Called when there is data to read.
Triggered when new raw data is available in the socket for reading. Overrides the base behavior to ...
Reads a chunk of incoming data and extracts it into a returned DataArray object.
Called when there is data to read.
Transmits a structural DataArray package out to the network layer.
Called when writing to the socket is possible.
